title: ODHS LOCAL OFFICES - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS LOCAL OFFICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Locator tool to find out local information for ODHS offices. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by County Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Adoption Services Adult Protective Intervention/Investigation Caregiver Training * Foster Parents Caregiver/Care Receiver Support Groups Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Case/Care Management * Older Adults Child Care Expense Assistance Children's Protective Services Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Elder/Dependent Adult Abuse Reporting Family Preservation Programs Food Stamps/SNAP Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Medicare Information/Counseling Post Disaster Food Services TANF Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues Vocational Rehabilitation Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - CHILDREN'S EXTRAORDINARY NEEDS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES
